summary: Backend-only validation of ATLAS Knowledge Network v1 (iter28) via public ingress URL. Ran pytest suite tests/test_iter28_knowledge_network.py against https://youthful-archimedes-7.preview.emergentagent.com — 19/19 PASS in 15.2s. Confirmed all 3 new endpoints (/stats, /by-agent/{agent}, /by-country/{country}) return 200 with correct shapes; new metadata fields source_language + culture_tag default and PATCH-persist correctly; dashboard now exposes sources_by_language + sources_by_culture facets; filter params honoured on /sources. No regressions across the 9 legacy endpoints listed in the request. /api/dev/pipeline/status has zero 'needs_runtime_check' strings — live probes are real.
critical_code_review_comments: Test module uses ATLAS_BACKEND_URL env var (not REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Documented for next agent — export ATLAS_BACKEND_URL=$REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL to test against ingress.
seed_data_creation: Test suite self-seeds/cleans disposable rows in 'watchers' collection for /by-country filter test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter28 KN v1 + Engineering Console fully green via ingress. To rerun: ATLAS_BACKEND_URL=$REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL pytest backend/tests/test_iter28_knowledge_network.py -v. Note: /api/kbase and /api/youtube bare-roots return 404 by design — real paths are /api/kbase/search and /api/youtube/dashboard (both 200).
